headline: Is Church & Dwight (CHD) Resetting After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are trying to work out whether Church & Dwight at around US$93 is a fair deal or not, the starting point is to understand what the current price already assumes about the business. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 1.4% decline over the last 7 days and an 11.3% decline over the last 30 days, yet it still shows a 12.8% gain year to date compared to a 12.9% decline over the past year. These swings are drawing attention to how the market is reassessing the company, and recent...
